mission.title: keda: Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in accurate scaling startegy
mission.description: Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in accurate scaling startegy. Requested by 8+ users.

steps.title: Check current keda deployment
steps.description:
Verify your keda version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
helm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working keda installation.

steps.title: Review keda configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant keda configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda
```
### Proposal

Currently KEDA looks for the Pod phase (when scaling strategy is set to `accurate`) to determine whether a pod is pending or not in order to avoid excess triggers when pod is waiting to start or create.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in…
steps.description:
Added the `pendingPodConditions` setting for which users can pass a list of [Pod Conditions](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/_print/#pod-conditions) which Keda will consider when calculating the pending job count.
```yaml
scalingStategy:
  strategy: "accurate"
  customPendingPodConditions: 
    - "Ready"
    - "PodScheduled"
    - "SomeOtherCustomConditionDefinedByReadinessGate"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda
kubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support Pod conditions for calculating PendingJobCount in…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Added the `pendingPodConditions` setting for which users can pass a list of [Pod Conditions](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/workloads/pods/_print/#pod-conditions) which Keda will consider when calculating the pending job count.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with keda installed or the issue environment reproducible.
